detail.description: Luis Matos grounds out, third baseman Ernie Clement to first baseman Kazuma Okamoto.
Luis Matos pops out to shortstop Andrés Giménez.
Luis Matos singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Daulton Varsho.
Luis Matos singles on a ground ball to left fielder Jesús Sánchez.
Luis Matos pops out to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr.
Luis Matos singles on a ground ball to right fielder Wenceel Pérez. Gary Sánchez to 2nd.
Luis Matos grounds out, third baseman Kevin McGonigle to first baseman Spencer Torkelson.
Luis Matos grounds out, shortstop Javier Báez to first baseman Spencer Torkelson.
Luis Matos pops out to catcher Dillon Dingler.
Luis Matos flies out to center fielder Ceddanne Rafaela.
Luis Matos grounds into a double play, shortstop Trevor Story to second baseman Marcelo Mayer to first baseman Willson Contreras. Joey Ortiz out at 2nd. Luis Matos out at 1st.
Luis Matos singles on a ground ball to left fielder Nick Loftin. Gary Sánchez to 2nd.
Luis Matos pops out to second baseman Xavier Edwards.
